critic_raw:
The task prompt appears to be corrupted — the methodology section contains a placeholder '[FULL CORRUPTED NARRATIVE AS COPY FROM STAGE 3]' rather than actual content. There is no methodology to critique. The only substantive fragment visible is a concluding sentence asserting that 'controls establish that observed gains come from the sequence approach and network feature quality, not from confounding variables or data leakage.' This claim cannot be evaluated because the controls themselves are not described.

I cannot manufacture methodological flaws from a document that contains no methodology. Rendering a verdict on the substance would require inventing content that was not provided, which would itself be a methodological failure on my part.

The appropriate response is to flag that no reviewable methodology exists in this submission.
